_example_purpose: Class 2 multi-turn refinement (doc 11 Phase 6.0): the user picked C1_LIGHTING_ASSISTANCE on the parent turn, then picked REFINE_BEDROOM on the refinement turn (with bedroom currently off, so action_hint='light_on'). This is the terminal record of the refinement session; it carries refinement_history with the parent → child transition.
notes: This is the TERMINAL record of the refinement turn. The parent session's record (not shown in this example) was a separate clarification_interaction with selected_candidate_id='C1_LIGHTING_ASSISTANCE' and a transition_target that produced this refinement session.

refinement_history captures the parent → child transition so audit can reconstruct the two-turn flow from this single terminal record. Refinement is bounded to one turn (max), so this array always has 0 or 1 entry today.

The refinement_question 'general' wording ('어느 방의 조명을 도와드릴까요?') matches doc 12 §2-B because each per-room choice carries the explicit verb (state-aware: bedroom_light='off' in this example → '켜드릴까요?' + light_on).
transition_target='CLASS_1' is confirmed-candidate evidence; the runtime re-enters the Deterministic Validator with the bounded candidate before any low-risk dispatch.
